            <h2>Method</h2>
            <section>
              <div class="symbol-detail-labels"><span class="label label-async">async</span></div>
              <h3 id="exposeFunctionIfAbsent"><span class="symbol-name">exposeFunctionIfAbsent</span><span class="signature"><span class="signature-params">(page, name, fn)</span></span></h3>
              <p>Expose a function to the page if it does not exist</p>
              <p>NOTE:
                Rewrite it to 'upsertFunction' after updating Puppeteer to 20.6 or higher
                using page.removeExposedFunction
                https://pptr.dev/api/puppeteer.page.removeExposedFunction</p>
              <section>
                <h4>Parameters</h4>
                <table class="jsdoc-details-table">
                  <thead>
                    <tr>
                      <th>Name</th>
                      <th>Type</th>
                      <th>Optional</th>
                      <th>Description</th>
                    </tr>
                  </thead>
                  <tbody>
                    <tr>
                      <td>
                        <p>page</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>&nbsp;</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>&nbsp;</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                      </td>
                    </tr>
                    <tr>
                      <td>
                        <p>name</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>string</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>&nbsp;</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                      </td>
                    </tr>
                    <tr>
                      <td>
                        <p>fn</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>function()</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>&nbsp;</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                      </td>
                    </tr>
                  </tbody>
                </table>
              </section>
              <dl class="dl-compact">
              </dl>
            </section>
            <h2>Abstract types</h2>
            <section>
              <h3 id="AddParticipantsResult"><span class="symbol-name">AddParticipantsResult</span><small class="property-type">
                  &nbsp;Object</small></h3>
              <p>An object that handles the result for <code>addParticipants</code> method</p>
              <section>
                <h4>Properties</h4>
                <table class="jsdoc-details-table">
                  <thead>
                    <tr>
                      <th>Name</th>
                      <th>Type</th>
                      <th>Optional</th>
                      <th>Description</th>
                    </tr>
                  </thead>
                  <tbody>
                    <tr>
                      <td>
                        <p>code</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>number</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>&nbsp;</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>The code of the result</p>
                      </td>
                    </tr>
                    <tr>
                      <td>
                        <p>message</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>string</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>&nbsp;</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>The result message</p>
                      </td>
                    </tr>
                    <tr>
                      <td>
                        <p>isInviteV4Sent</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>boolean</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>&nbsp;</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>Indicates if the inviteV4 was sent to the partitipant</p>
                      </td>
                    </tr>
                  </tbody>
                </table>
              </section>
              <dl class="dl-compact">
              </dl>
              <h3 id="AddParticipnatsOptions"><span class="symbol-name">AddParticipnatsOptions</span><small class="property-type">
                  &nbsp;Object</small></h3>
              <p>An object that handles options for adding participants</p>
              <section>
                <h4>Properties</h4>
                <table class="jsdoc-details-table">
                  <thead>
                    <tr>
                      <th>Name</th>
                      <th>Type</th>
                      <th>Optional</th>
                      <th>Description</th>
                    </tr>
                  </thead>
                  <tbody>
                    <tr>
                      <td>
                        <p>sleep</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>(Array of number or number)</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>Yes</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>The number of milliseconds to wait before adding the next participant. If it is an array, a random sleep time between the sleep[0] and sleep[1] values will be added (the difference must be &gt;=100 ms, otherwise, a random sleep time between sleep[1] and sleep[1] + 100 will be added). If sleep is a number, a sleep time equal to its value will be added. By default, sleep is an array with a value of [250, 500]</p>
                        <p>Defaults to <code>[250, 500]</code>.</p>
                      </td>
                    </tr>
                    <tr>
                      <td>
                        <p>autoSendInviteV4</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>boolean</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>Yes</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>If true, the inviteV4 will be sent to those participants who have restricted others from being automatically added to groups, otherwise the inviteV4 won't be sent (true by default)</p>
                        <p>Defaults to <code>true</code>.</p>
                      </td>
                    </tr>
                    <tr>
                      <td>
                        <p>comment</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>string</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>Yes</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>The comment to be added to an inviteV4 (empty string by default)</p>
                        <p>Defaults to <code>''</code>.</p>
                      </td>
                    </tr>
                  </tbody>
                </table>
              </section>
              <dl class="dl-compact">
              </dl>
              <h3 id="ButtonSpec"><span class="symbol-name">ButtonSpec</span><small class="property-type">
                  &nbsp;Object</small></h3>
              <p>Button spec used in Buttons constructor</p>
              <section>

                <table class="jsdoc-details-table">

                      <th>Name</th>

                      <th>Description</th>

                        <p>id</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>string</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>Yes</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>Custom ID to set on the button. A random one will be generated if one is not passed.</p>
                      </td>
                    </tr>
                    <tr>
                      <td>
                        <p>body</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>string</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>&nbsp;</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>The text to show on the button.</p>
                      </td>
                    </tr>
                  </tbody>
                </table>
              </section>

              <h3 id="CreateChannelOptions"><span class="symbol-name">CreateChannelOptions</span><small class="property-type">

              <h3 id="CreateChannelResult"><span class="symbol-name">CreateChannelResult</span><small class="property-type">
                  &nbsp;Object</small></h3>
              <p>An object that handles the result for <code>createChannel</code> method</p>
              <section>
                <h4>Properties</h4>
                <table class="jsdoc-details-table">
                  <thead>
                    <tr>
                      <th>Name</th>
                      <th>Type</th>
                      <th>Optional</th>
                      <th>Description</th>
                    </tr>
                  </thead>
                  <tbody>
                    <tr>
                      <td>
                        <p>title</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>string</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>&nbsp;</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>A channel title</p>
                      </td>
                    </tr>
                    <tr>
                      <td>
                        <p>nid</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>ChatId</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>&nbsp;</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>An object that handels the newly created channel ID</p>
                        <p>Values in <code>nid</code> have the following properties:</p>
                        <table class="jsdoc-details-table">
                          <thead>
                            <tr>
                              <th>Name</th>
                              <th>Type</th>
                              <th>Optional</th>
                              <th>Description</th>
                            </tr>
                          </thead>
                          <tbody>
                            <tr>
                              <td>
                                <p>server</p>
                              </td>
                              <td>
                                <p>string</p>
                              </td>
                              <td>
                                <p>&nbsp;</p>
                              </td>
                              <td>
                                <p>'newsletter'</p>
                              </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                              <td>
                                <p>user</p>
                              </td>
                              <td>
                                <p>string</p>
                              </td>
                              <td>
                                <p>&nbsp;</p>
                              </td>
                              <td>
                                <p>'XXXXXXXXXX'</p>
                              </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                              <td>
                                <p>_serialized</p>
                              </td>
                              <td>
                                <p>string</p>
                              </td>
                              <td>
                                <p>&nbsp;</p>
                              </td>
                              <td>
                                <p>'XXXXXXXXXX@newsletter'</p>
                              </td>
                            </tr>
                          </tbody>
                        </table>
                      </td>
                    </tr>
                    <tr>
                      <td>
                        <p>inviteLink</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>string</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>&nbsp;</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>The channel invite link, starts with 'https://whatsapp.com/channel/'</p>
                      </td>
                    </tr>
                    <tr>
                      <td>
                        <p>createdAtTs</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>number</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>&nbsp;</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>The timestamp the channel was created at</p>
                      </td>
                    </tr>
                  </tbody>
                </table>
              </section>
              <dl class="dl-compact">
              </dl>
              <h3 id="CreateGroupOptions"><span class="symbol-name">CreateGroupOptions</span><small class="property-type">
                  &nbsp;Object</small></h3>
              <p>An object that handles options for group creation</p>
              <section>
                <h4>Properties</h4>
                <table class="jsdoc-details-table">
                  <thead>
                    <tr>
                      <th>Name</th>
                      <th>Type</th>
                      <th>Optional</th>
                      <th>Description</th>
                    </tr>
                  </thead>
                  <tbody>
                    <tr>
                      <td>
                        <p>messageTimer</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>number</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>Yes</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>The number of seconds for the messages to disappear in the group (0 by default, won't take an effect if the group is been creating with myself only)</p>
                        <p>Defaults to <code>0</code>.</p>
                      </td>
                    </tr>
                    <tr>
                      <td>
                        <p>parentGroupId</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>(string or undefined)</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>&nbsp;</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>The ID of a parent community group to link the newly created group with (won't take an effect if the group is been creating with myself only)</p>
                      </td>
                    </tr>
                    <tr>
                      <td>
                        <p>autoSendInviteV4</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>boolean</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>Yes</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>If true, the inviteV4 will be sent to those participants who have restricted others from being automatically added to groups, otherwise the inviteV4 won't be sent (true by default)</p>
                        <p>Defaults to <code>true</code>.</p>
                      </td>
                    </tr>
                    <tr>
                      <td>
                        <p>comment</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>string</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>Yes</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>The comment to be added to an inviteV4 (empty string by default)</p>
                        <p>Defaults to <code>''</code>.</p>
                      </td>
                    </tr>
                    <tr>
                      <td>
                        <p>memberAddMode</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>boolean</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>Yes</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>If true, only admins can add members to the group (false by default)</p>
                        <p>Defaults to <code>false</code>.</p>
                      </td>
                    </tr>
                    <tr>
                      <td>
                        <p>membershipApprovalMode</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>boolean</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>Yes</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>If true, group admins will be required to approve anyone who wishes to join the group (false by default)</p>
                        <p>Defaults to <code>false</code>.</p>
                      </td>
                    </tr>
                    <tr>
                      <td>
                        <p>isRestrict</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>boolean</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>Yes</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>If true, only admins can change group group info (true by default)</p>
                        <p>Defaults to <code>true</code>.</p>
                      </td>
                    </tr>
                    <tr>
                      <td>
                        <p>isAnnounce</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>boolean</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>Yes</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>If true, only admins can send messages (false by default)</p>
                        <p>Defaults to <code>false</code>.</p>
                      </td>
                    </tr>
                  </tbody>
                </table>
              </section>
              <dl class="dl-compact">
              </dl>
              <h3 id="CreateGroupResult"><span class="symbol-name">CreateGroupResult</span><small class="property-type">
                  &nbsp;Object</small></h3>
              <p>An object that handles the result for <code>createGroup</code> method</p>
              <section>
                <h4>Properties</h4>

                    </tr>
                    <tr>
                      <td>
                        <p>gid</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>Object</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>&nbsp;</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>An object that handles the newly created group ID</p>
                        <p>Values in <code>gid</code> have the following properties:</p>
                        <table class="jsdoc-details-table">
                          <thead>
                            <tr>
                              <th>Name</th>
                              <th>Type</th>
                              <th>Optional</th>
                              <th>Description</th>
                            </tr>
                          </thead>
                          <tbody>
                            <tr>
                              <td>
                                <p>server</p>
                              </td>
                              <td>
                                <p>string</p>
                              </td>
                              <td>
                                <p>&nbsp;</p>
                              </td>
                              <td>
                              </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                              <td>
                                <p>user</p>
                              </td>
                              <td>
                                <p>string</p>
                              </td>
                              <td>
                                <p>&nbsp;</p>
                              </td>
                              <td>
                              </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                              <td>
                                <p>_serialized</p>
                              </td>
                              <td>
                                <p>string</p>
                              </td>
                              <td>
                                <p>&nbsp;</p>
                              </td>
                              <td>
                              </td>
                            </tr>
                          </tbody>
                        </table>
                      </td>
                    </tr>
                    <tr>
                      <td>
                        <p>participants</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>Object with <a href="global.html#ParticipantResult">ParticipantResult</a> properties</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>&nbsp;</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>An object that handles the result value for each added to the group participant</p>
                      </td>
                    </tr>
                  </tbody>
                </table>
              </section>

              <h3 id="GroupMembershipRequest"><span class="symbol-name">GroupMembershipRequest</span><small class="property-type">
                  &nbsp;Object</small></h3>
              <p>An object that handles the information about the group membership request</p>
              <section>
                <h4>Properties</h4>
                <table class="jsdoc-details-table">
                  <thead>
                    <tr>
                      <th>Name</th>
                      <th>Type</th>
                      <th>Optional</th>
                      <th>Description</th>
                    </tr>
                  </thead>
                  <tbody>
                    <tr>
                      <td>
                        <p>id</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>Object</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>&nbsp;</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>The wid of a user who requests to enter the group</p>
                      </td>
                    </tr>
                    <tr>
                      <td>
                        <p>addedBy</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>Object</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>&nbsp;</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>The wid of a user who created that request</p>
                      </td>
                    </tr>
                    <tr>
                      <td>
                        <p>parentGroupId</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>(Object or null)</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>&nbsp;</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>The wid of a community parent group to which the current group is linked</p>
                      </td>
                    </tr>
                    <tr>
                      <td>
                        <p>requestMethod</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>string</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>&nbsp;</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>The method used to create the request: NonAdminAdd/InviteLink/LinkedGroupJoin</p>
                      </td>
                    </tr>
                    <tr>
                      <td>
                        <p>t</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>number</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>&nbsp;</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>The timestamp the request was created at</p>
                      </td>
                    </tr>
                  </tbody>
                </table>
              </section>

              </dl>

              <h3 id="MembershipRequestActionOptions"><span class="symbol-name">MembershipRequestActionOptions</span><small class="property-type">
                  &nbsp;Object</small></h3>
              <p>An object that handles options for <code>approveGroupMembershipRequests</code> and <code>rejectGroupMembershipRequests</code> methods</p>
              <section>
                <h4>Properties</h4>
                <table class="jsdoc-details-table">
                  <thead>
                    <tr>
                      <th>Name</th>
                      <th>Type</th>
                      <th>Optional</th>
                      <th>Description</th>
                    </tr>
                  </thead>
                  <tbody>
                    <tr>
                      <td>
                        <p>requesterIds</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>(Array of string, string, or null)</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>&nbsp;</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>User ID/s who requested to join the group, if no value is provided, the method will search for all membership requests for that group</p>
                      </td>
                    </tr>
                    <tr>
                      <td>
                        <p>sleep</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>(Array of number, number, or null)</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>&nbsp;</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>The number of milliseconds to wait before performing an operation for the next requester. If it is an array, a random sleep time between the sleep[0] and sleep[1] values will be added (the difference must be &gt;=100 ms, otherwise, a random sleep time between sleep[1] and sleep[1] + 100 will be added). If sleep is a number, a sleep time equal to its value will be added. By default, sleep is an array with a value of [250, 500]</p>
                      </td>
                    </tr>
                  </tbody>
                </table>
              </section>
              <dl class="dl-compact">
              </dl>
              <h3 id="MembershipRequestActionOptions"><span class="symbol-name">MembershipRequestActionOptions</span><small class="property-type">
                  &nbsp;Object</small></h3>
              <p>An object that handles options for <code>approveGroupMembershipRequests</code> and <code>rejectGroupMembershipRequests</code> methods</p>
              <section>
                <h4>Properties</h4>
                <table class="jsdoc-details-table">
                  <thead>
                    <tr>
                      <th>Name</th>
                      <th>Type</th>
                      <th>Optional</th>
                      <th>Description</th>
                    </tr>
                  </thead>
                  <tbody>
                    <tr>
                      <td>
                        <p>requesterIds</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>(Array of string, string, or null)</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>&nbsp;</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>User ID/s who requested to join the group, if no value is provided, the method will search for all membership requests for that group</p>
                      </td>
                    </tr>
                    <tr>
                      <td>
                        <p>sleep</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>(Array of number, number, or null)</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>&nbsp;</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>The number of milliseconds to wait before performing an operation for the next requester. If it is an array, a random sleep time between the sleep[0] and sleep[1] values will be added (the difference must be &gt;=100 ms, otherwise, a random sleep time between sleep[1] and sleep[1] + 100 will be added). If sleep is a number, a sleep time equal to its value will be added. By default, sleep is an array with a value of [250, 500]</p>
                      </td>
                    </tr>
                  </tbody>
                </table>
              </section>
              <dl class="dl-compact">
              </dl>

                      <td>
                        <p>delivery</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>Array of {id: <a href="global.html#ContactId">ContactId</a>, t: number}</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>&nbsp;</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>Contacts to which the message has been delivered to</p>
                      </td>
                    </tr>
                    <tr>
                      <td>
                        <p>deliveryRemaining</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>number</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>&nbsp;</p>
                      </td>

                    </tr>
                    <tr>
                      <td>
                        <p>played</p>

                      </td>
                      <td>

                      <td>

                    </tr>
                    <tr>
                      <td>
                        <p>read</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>Array of {id: <a href="global.html#ContactId">ContactId</a>, t: number}</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>&nbsp;</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>Contacts who have read the message</p>
                      </td>
                    </tr>
                    <tr>
                      <td>
                        <p>readRemaining</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>number</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>&nbsp;</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>Amount of people who have not read the message</p>
                      </td>
                    </tr>
                  </tbody>
                </table>
              </section>
              <dl class="dl-compact">
              </dl>
              <h3 id="MessageSendOptions"><span class="symbol-name">MessageSendOptions</span><small class="property-type">

              <section>

                      <td>
                        <p>Yes</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>Show links preview. Has no effect on multi-device accounts.</p>
                        <p>Defaults to <code>true</code>.</p>
                      </td>
                    </tr>
                    <tr>
                      <td>
                        <p>sendAudioAsVoice</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>boolean</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>Yes</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>Send audio as voice message with a generated waveform</p>
                        <p>Defaults to <code>false</code>.</p>
                      </td>
                    </tr>
                    <tr>
                      <td>
                        <p>sendVideoAsGif</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>boolean</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>Yes</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>Send video as gif</p>
                        <p>Defaults to <code>false</code>.</p>
                      </td>
                    </tr>
                    <tr>
                      <td>
                        <p>sendMediaAsSticker</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>boolean</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>Yes</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>Send media as a sticker</p>
                        <p>Defaults to <code>false</code>.</p>
                      </td>
                    </tr>
                    <tr>
                      <td>
                        <p>sendMediaAsDocument</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>boolean</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>Yes</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>Send media as a document</p>
                        <p>Defaults to <code>false</code>.</p>
                      </td>
                    </tr>
                    <tr>
                      <td>
                        <p>sendMediaAsHd</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>boolean</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>Yes</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>Send image as quality HD</p>
                        <p>Defaults to <code>false</code>.</p>
                      </td>
                    </tr>
                    <tr>
                      <td>
                        <p>isViewOnce</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>boolean</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>Yes</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>Send photo/video as a view once message</p>
                        <p>Defaults to <code>false</code>.</p>
                      </td>
                    </tr>
                    <tr>
                      <td>
                        <p>parseVCards</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>boolean</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>Yes</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>Automatically parse vCards and send them as contacts</p>
                        <p>Defaults to <code>true</code>.</p>
                      </td>
                    </tr>
                    <tr>
                      <td>
                        <p>caption</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>string</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>Yes</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>Image or video caption</p>
                      </td>
                    </tr>
                    <tr>
                      <td>
                        <p>quotedMessageId</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>string</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>Yes</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>Id of the message that is being quoted (or replied to)</p>
                      </td>
                    </tr>
                    <tr>
                      <td>
                        <p>groupMentions</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>Array of <a href="global.html#GroupMention">GroupMention</a></p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>Yes</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>An array of object that handle group mentions</p>
                      </td>
                    </tr>
                    <tr>
                      <td>
                        <p>mentions</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>Array of string</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>Yes</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>User IDs to mention in the message</p>
                      </td>
                    </tr>
                    <tr>
                      <td>
                        <p>sendSeen</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>boolean</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>Yes</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>Mark the conversation as seen after sending the message</p>
                        <p>Defaults to <code>true</code>.</p>
                      </td>
                    </tr>
                    <tr>
                      <td>
                        <p>invokedBotWid</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>string</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>Yes</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>Bot Wid when doing a bot mention like @Meta AI</p>
                      </td>
                    </tr>
                    <tr>
                      <td>
                        <p>stickerAuthor</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>string</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>Yes</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>Sets the author of the sticker, (if sendMediaAsSticker is true).</p>
                      </td>
                    </tr>
                    <tr>
                      <td>
                        <p>stickerName</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>string</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>Yes</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>Sets the name of the sticker, (if sendMediaAsSticker is true).</p>
                      </td>
                    </tr>
                    <tr>
                      <td>
                        <p>stickerCategories</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>Array of string</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>Yes</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>Sets the categories of the sticker, (if sendMediaAsSticker is true). Provide emoji char array, can be null.</p>
                      </td>
                    </tr>
                    <tr>
                      <td>
                        <p>ignoreQuoteErrors</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>boolean</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>Yes</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>Should the bot send a quoted message without the quoted message if it fails to get the quote?</p>
                        <p>Defaults to <code>true</code>.</p>
                      </td>
                    </tr>
                    <tr>
                      <td>
                        <p>waitUntilMsgSent</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>boolean</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>Yes</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>Should the bot wait for the message send result?</p>
                        <p>Defaults to <code>false</code>.</p>
                      </td>
                    </tr>
                    <tr>
                      <td>
                        <p>media</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p><a href="MessageMedia.html">MessageMedia</a></p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>Yes</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>Media to be sent</p>
                      </td>
                    </tr>
                    <tr>
                      <td>
                        <p>extra</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>any</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>Yes</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>Extra options</p>
                      </td>
                    </tr>
                  </tbody>
                </table>
              </section>
              <dl class="dl-compact">
              </dl>
              <h3 id="MessageSendOptions"><span class="symbol-name">MessageSendOptions</span><small class="property-type">
                  &nbsp;Object</small></h3>
              <p>Message options</p>
              <section>
                <h4>Properties</h4>
                <table class="jsdoc-details-table">
                  <thead>
                    <tr>
                      <th>Name</th>
                      <th>Type</th>
                      <th>Optional</th>
                      <th>Description</th>
                    </tr>
                  </thead>
                  <tbody>
                    <tr>
                      <td>
                        <p>caption</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>string</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>&nbsp;</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>Image or video caption</p>
                        <p>Value can be null.</p>
                      </td>
                    </tr>
                    <tr>
                      <td>
                        <p>mentions</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>Array of string</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>&nbsp;</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>User IDs of user that will be mentioned in the message</p>
                        <p>Value can be null.</p>
                      </td>
                    </tr>
                    <tr>
                      <td>
                        <p>media</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p><a href="MessageMedia.html">MessageMedia</a></p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>&nbsp;</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>Image or video to be sent</p>
                        <p>Value can be null.</p>
                      </td>
                    </tr>
                  </tbody>
                </table>
              </section>
              <dl class="dl-compact">
              </dl>
              <h3 id="ParticipantResult"><span class="symbol-name">ParticipantResult</span><small class="property-type">
                  &nbsp;Object</small></h3>
              <p>An object that represents the result for a participant added to a group</p>
              <section>
                <h4>Properties</h4>
                <table class="jsdoc-details-table">
                  <thead>
                    <tr>
                      <th>Name</th>
                      <th>Type</th>
                      <th>Optional</th>
                      <th>Description</th>
                    </tr>
                  </thead>
                  <tbody>
                    <tr>
                      <td>
                        <p>statusCode</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>number</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>&nbsp;</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>The status code of the result</p>
                      </td>
                    </tr>
                    <tr>
                      <td>
                        <p>message</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>string</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>&nbsp;</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>The result message</p>
                      </td>
                    </tr>
                    <tr>
                      <td>
                        <p>isGroupCreator</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>boolean</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>&nbsp;</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>Indicates if the participant is a group creator</p>
                      </td>
                    </tr>
                    <tr>
                      <td>
                        <p>isInviteV4Sent</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>boolean</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>&nbsp;</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>Indicates if the inviteV4 was sent to the participant</p>
                      </td>
                    </tr>
                  </tbody>
                </table>
              </section>
              <dl class="dl-compact">
              </dl>
              <h3 id="PollSendOptions"><span class="symbol-name">PollSendOptions</span><small class="property-type">
                  &nbsp;Object</small></h3>
              <p>Poll send options</p>
              <section>
                <h4>Properties</h4>
                <table class="jsdoc-details-table">
                  <thead>
                    <tr>
                      <th>Name</th>
                      <th>Type</th>
                      <th>Optional</th>
                      <th>Description</th>
                    </tr>
                  </thead>
                  <tbody>
                    <tr>
                      <td>
                        <p>allowMultipleAnswers</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>boolean</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>Yes</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>If false it is a single choice poll, otherwise it is a multiple choice poll (false by default)</p>
                        <p>Defaults to <code>false</code>.</p>
                      </td>
                    </tr>
                    <tr>
                      <td>
                        <p>messageSecret</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>Array of number</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>&nbsp;</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>The custom message secret, can be used as a poll ID. NOTE: it has to be a unique vector with a length of 32</p>
                        <p>Value can be null.</p>
                      </td>
                    </tr>
                  </tbody>
                </table>
              </section>
              <dl class="dl-compact">
              </dl>
              <h3 id="ReactionList"><span class="symbol-name">ReactionList</span><small class="property-type">
                  &nbsp;Object</small></h3>
              <p>Reaction List</p>
              <section>
                <h4>Properties</h4>
                <table class="jsdoc-details-table">
                  <thead>
                    <tr>
                      <th>Name</th>
                      <th>Type</th>
                      <th>Optional</th>
                      <th>Description</th>
                    </tr>
                  </thead>
                  <tbody>
                    <tr>
                      <td>
                        <p>id</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>string</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>&nbsp;</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>Original emoji</p>
                      </td>
                    </tr>
                    <tr>
                      <td>
                        <p>aggregateEmoji</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>string</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>&nbsp;</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>aggregate emoji</p>
                      </td>
                    </tr>
                    <tr>
                      <td>
                        <p>hasReactionByMe</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>boolean</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>&nbsp;</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>Flag who sent the reaction</p>
                      </td>
                    </tr>
                    <tr>
                      <td>
                        <p>senders</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>Array of <a href="Reaction.html">Reaction</a></p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>&nbsp;</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>Reaction senders, to this message</p>
                      </td>
                    </tr>
                  </tbody>
                </table>
              </section>
              <dl class="dl-compact">
              </dl>
              <h3 id="ScheduledEventSendOptions"><span class="symbol-name">ScheduledEventSendOptions</span><small class="property-type">
                  &nbsp;Object</small></h3>
              <p>ScheduledEvent send options</p>
              <section>
                <h4>Properties</h4>
                <table class="jsdoc-details-table">
                  <thead>
                    <tr>
                      <th>Name</th>
                      <th>Type</th>
                      <th>Optional</th>
                      <th>Description</th>
                    </tr>
                  </thead>
                  <tbody>
                    <tr>
                      <td>
                        <p>description</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>string</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>&nbsp;</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>The scheduled event description</p>
                        <p>Value can be null.</p>
                      </td>
                    </tr>
                    <tr>
                      <td>
                        <p>endTime</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>Date</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>&nbsp;</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>The end time of the event</p>
                        <p>Value can be null.</p>
                      </td>
                    </tr>
                    <tr>
                      <td>
                        <p>location</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>string</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>&nbsp;</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>The location of the event</p>
                        <p>Value can be null.</p>
                      </td>
                    </tr>
                    <tr>
                      <td>
                        <p>callType</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>string</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>&nbsp;</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>The type of a WhatsApp call link to generate, valid values are: <code>video</code> | <code>voice</code></p>
                        <p>Value can be null.</p>
                      </td>
                    </tr>
                    <tr>
                      <td>
                        <p>isEventCanceled</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>boolean</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>Yes</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>Indicates if a scheduled event should be sent as an already canceled</p>
                        <p>Defaults to <code>false</code>.</p>
                      </td>
                    </tr>
                    <tr>
                      <td>
                        <p>messageSecret</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>Array of number</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>&nbsp;</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>The custom message secret, can be used as an event ID. NOTE: it has to be a unique vector with a length of 32</p>
                        <p>Value can be null.</p>
                      </td>
                    </tr>
                  </tbody>
                </table>
              </section>
              <dl class="dl-compact">
              </dl>

              <h3 id="TargetOptions"><span class="symbol-name">TargetOptions</span><small class="property-type">

              <h3 id="TargetOptions"><span class="symbol-name">TargetOptions</span><small class="property-type">
                  &nbsp;Object</small></h3>
              <p>Target options object description</p>
              <section>
                <h4>Properties</h4>
                <table class="jsdoc-details-table">
                  <thead>
                    <tr>
                      <th>Name</th>
                      <th>Type</th>
                      <th>Optional</th>
                      <th>Description</th>
                    </tr>
                  </thead>
                  <tbody>
                    <tr>
                      <td>
                        <p>module</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>(string or number)</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>&nbsp;</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>The target module</p>
                      </td>
                    </tr>
                    <tr>
                      <td>
                        <p>function</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>string</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>&nbsp;</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>The function name to get from a module</p>
                      </td>
                    </tr>
                  </tbody>
                </table>
              </section>
              <dl class="dl-compact">
              </dl>
              <h3 id="TransferChannelOwnershipOptions"><span class="symbol-name">TransferChannelOwnershipOptions</span><small class="property-type">
                  &nbsp;Object</small></h3>
              <p>Options for transferring a channel ownership to another user</p>
              <section>
                <h4>Property</h4>
                <table class="jsdoc-details-table">
                  <thead>
                    <tr>
                      <th>Name</th>
                      <th>Type</th>
                      <th>Optional</th>
                      <th>Description</th>
                    </tr>
                  </thead>
                  <tbody>
                    <tr>
                      <td>
                        <p>shouldDismissSelfAsAdmin</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>boolean</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>Yes</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>If true, after the channel ownership is being transferred to another user, the current user will be dismissed as a channel admin and will become to a channel subscriber.</p>
                        <p>Defaults to <code>false</code>.</p>
                      </td>
                    </tr>
                  </tbody>
                </table>
              </section>
              <dl class="dl-compact">
              </dl>
              <h3 id="TransferChannelOwnershipOptions"><span class="symbol-name">TransferChannelOwnershipOptions</span><small class="property-type">
                  &nbsp;Object</small></h3>
              <p>Options for transferring a channel ownership to another user</p>
              <section>
                <h4>Property</h4>
                <table class="jsdoc-details-table">
                  <thead>
                    <tr>
                      <th>Name</th>
                      <th>Type</th>
                      <th>Optional</th>
                      <th>Description</th>
                    </tr>
                  </thead>
                  <tbody>
                    <tr>
                      <td>
                        <p>shouldDismissSelfAsAdmin</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>boolean</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>Yes</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>If true, after the channel ownership is being transferred to another user, the current user will be dismissed as a channel admin and will become to a channel subscriber.</p>
                        <p>Defaults to <code>false</code>.</p>
                      </td>
                    </tr>
                  </tbody>
                </table>
              </section>
              <dl class="dl-compact">
              </dl>
              <h3 id="UnsubscribeOptions"><span class="symbol-name">UnsubscribeOptions</span><small class="property-type">
                  &nbsp;Object</small></h3>
              <p>Options for unsubscribe from a channel</p>
              <section>
                <h4>Property</h4>
                <table class="jsdoc-details-table">
                  <thead>
                    <tr>
                      <th>Name</th>
                      <th>Type</th>
                      <th>Optional</th>
                      <th>Description</th>
                    </tr>
                  </thead>
                  <tbody>
                    <tr>
                      <td>
                        <p>deleteLocalModels</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>boolean</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>Yes</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>If true, after an unsubscription, it will completely remove a channel from the channel collection making it seem like the current user have never interacted with it. Otherwise it will only remove a channel from the list of channels the current user is subscribed to and will set the membership type for that channel to GUEST</p>
                        <p>Defaults to <code>false</code>.</p>
                      </td>
                    </tr>
                  </tbody>
                </table>
              </section>
              <dl class="dl-compact">
              </dl>
            </section>
          </section>
        </div>

              <h3 id="approveGroupMembershipRequests"><span class="symbol-name">approveGroupMembershipRequests</span><span class="signature"><span class="signature-params">(options)</span>&nbsp;&rarr; <span class="signature-returns"> Promise containing Array of <a href="global.html#MembershipRequestActionResult">MembershipRequestActionResult</a></span></span></h3>

                <dt>Returns</dt>

              <h3 id="demoteParticipants"><span class="symbol-name">demoteParticipants</span><span class="signature"><span class="signature-params">(participantIds)</span>&nbsp;&rarr; <span class="signature-returns"> Promise containing {status: number}</span></span></h3>

              <h3 id="fetchMessages"><span class="symbol-name">fetchMessages</span><span class="signature"><span class="signature-params">(searchOptions)</span>&nbsp;&rarr; <span class="signature-returns"> Promise containing Array of <a href="Message.html">Message</a></span></span></h3>
              <p>Loads chat messages, sorted from earliest to latest.</p>
              <section>
                <h4>Parameters</h4>
                <table class="jsdoc-details-table">
                  <thead>
                    <tr>
                      <th>Name</th>
                      <th>Type</th>
                      <th>Optional</th>
                      <th>Description</th>
                    </tr>
                  </thead>
                  <tbody>
                    <tr>
                      <td>
                        <p>searchOptions</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>&nbsp;</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>&nbsp;</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>Options for searching messages. Right now only limit and fromMe is supported.</p>
                        <p>Values in <code>searchOptions</code> have the following properties:</p>
                        <table class="jsdoc-details-table">
                          <thead>
                            <tr>
                              <th>Name</th>
                              <th>Type</th>
                              <th>Optional</th>
                              <th>Description</th>
                            </tr>
                          </thead>
                          <tbody>
                            <tr>
                              <td>
                                <p>limit</p>
                              </td>
                              <td>
                                <p>&nbsp;</p>
                              </td>
                              <td>
                                <p>Yes</p>
                              </td>
                              <td>
                                <p>The amount of messages to return. If no limit is specified, the available messages will be returned. Note that the actual number of returned messages may be smaller if there aren't enough messages in the conversation. Set this to Infinity to load all messages.</p>
                              </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                              <td>
                                <p>fromMe</p>
                              </td>
                              <td>
                                <p>&nbsp;</p>
                              </td>
                              <td>
                                <p>Yes</p>
                              </td>
                              <td>
                                <p>Return only messages from the bot number or vise versa. To get all messages, leave the option undefined.</p>
                              </td>
                            </tr>
                          </tbody>
                        </table>
                      </td>
                    </tr>
                  </tbody>
                </table>
              </section>
              <dl class="dl-compact">
                <dt>Inherited from</dt>
                <dd><a href="Chat.html#fetchMessages">Chat#fetchMessages</a></dd>
                <dt>Returns</dt>
                <dd></dd>
              </dl>
              <div class="symbol-detail-labels"><span class="label label-async">async</span></div>

              <h3 id="mute"><span class="symbol-name">mute</span><span class="signature"><span class="signature-params">(unmuteDate)</span>&nbsp;&rarr; <span class="signature-returns"> Promise containing {isMuted: boolean, muteExpiration: number}</span></span></h3>

                      </td>

                <table class="jsdoc-details-table">

                      </td>

                  </tbody>

                <dt>Returns</dt>
                <dd>
                  <p><code>Promise containing Array of <a href="global.html#MembershipRequestActionResult">MembershipRequestActionResult</a></code>

                </dd>

              <h3 id="setAddMembersAdminsOnly"><span class="symbol-name">setAddMembersAdminsOnly</span><span class="signature"><span class="signature-params">([adminsOnly])</span>&nbsp;&rarr; <span class="signature-returns"> Promise containing boolean</span></span></h3>
              <p>Updates the group setting to allow only admins to add members to the group.</p>
              <section>
                <h4>Parameter</h4>
                <table class="jsdoc-details-table">
                  <thead>
                    <tr>
                      <th>Name</th>
                      <th>Type</th>
                      <th>Optional</th>
                      <th>Description</th>
                    </tr>
                  </thead>
                  <tbody>
                    <tr>
                      <td>
                        <p>adminsOnly</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>boolean</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>Yes</p>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <p>Enable or disable this option</p>
                        <p>Defaults to <code>true</code>.</p>
                      </td>
                    </tr>
                  </tbody>
                </table>
              </section>
              <dl class="dl-compact">
                <dt>Returns</dt>
                <dd>
                  <p><code>Promise containing boolean</code> 
                  <p>Returns true if the setting was properly updated. This can return false if the user does not have the necessary permissions.</p>
                  </p>
                </dd>
              </dl>
              <div class="symbol-detail-labels"><span class="label label-async">async</span></div>
